name: Foreign Key Hierarchy Crawler
description: Performs BFS traversal of the foreign key graph to produce ordered dimension->transaction table paths for use by the Intent Mapping Agent.

start_table.description: Root table name for BFS traversal.

max_depth.description: Maximum BFS depth. Prevents runaway traversal on cyclical keys.

graph_path.description: Path to the foreign key hierarchy JSON.

path.description: Ordered BFS path: dimensions first, transactions last.
